name: Human API Mobile Platform
description: Agent-native platform enabling AI agents to directly specify and assign human labeling tasks, bridging the gap between AI capabilities and human judgment. Agents can hire human contributors for data labeling, annotation, and specialized tasks.
capabilities: Direct task specification from AI agents
Domain expert access for specialized work
notes: Launched mobile platform January 2026 with $65M funding. Creates agent-native data labeling industry where agents directly interact with human contributor network without managed service intermediaries.
